# News → Prophecy Map
*Auto-generated current events mapped to biblical prophecy*

> **How this file is updated:**
> Run `python3 scripts/news_prophecy_mapper.py` to fetch current news and map it to Scripture.
> For automated daily updates (Linux/Mac):
> ```bash
> crontab -e
> # Add: 0 7 * * * cd /path/to/Bible-MD-Files && python3 scripts/news_prophecy_mapper.py
> ```
>
> **Hermeneutical note:** The presence of news that matches prophetic patterns does NOT mean
> these prophecies are being fulfilled right now. Infrastructure and precursor conditions may
> exist for years before actual fulfillment. This tool is for theological awareness, not date-setting.

> **Cross-reference:** [[PROPHECY_FULFILLMENT_INDEX]] · [[COVENANT_INDEX]] · [[_VAULT_HOME]]
> **Dataview queries:** [[templates/DATAVIEW_QUERIES#section-5-current-events--news-queries|Q16–Q18]]
